description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical beverage can with a metallic finish, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola branding in bold script across its surface. The can is primarily silver with red and black accents, and the word 'Diet' is visible above the main logo, indicating it is a Diet Coke variant. The top of the can has a standard pull-tab opening, and the sides display nutritional information and branding details. The surface appears smooth and reflective, typical of aluminum cans. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears unopened. The object is likely empty or filled with air or liquid, as is standard for beverage cans.
description: A tall, metallic Diet Coke can with silver, red, and black branding, smooth reflective surface, and a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Coca-Cola logo, 'Diet' label, and part of the pull-tab top.
description_view_1: Side view with the Coca-Cola script partially visible, less detail on branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying nutritional information and text, with minimal branding.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the Coca-Cola script wrapping around the can, with the pull-tab top partially visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Coca-Cola logo in black script, 'Diet' in red above the logo, additional branding and nutritional information in black and red text on a silver background.
